work_context.title: Plan next MCP slow-call optimizations
work_context.planTitle: Reduce the next highest-priority MCP slow-call hotspots after excluding prism_mutate mutate.coordination, starting with prism://plans, prism_concept, and shared compact-tool read paths, then validate the latency improvements with repo-wide call-log evidence.

summary: observed file change: 1 added, 0 removed, 29 updated symbols

changedSymbols.name: Validate crash safety, restart behavior, latency reduction, memory bounds, and multi-instance shared-runtime correctness for the migration
Validate crash safety, restart behavior, latency reduction, memory bounds, and multi-instance shared-runtime correctness for the migration

persistence-migration: migrate PRISM to a memory-authoritative runtime with synchronous authoritative journals, asynchronous checkpoint/materialization persistence, bounded hot state, and explicit cold-query semantics; finish by reviewing with the user whether a separate persistence worker deserves a follow-up plan.
